items.title: Can Visa Sustain Global Partnerships Through Renewals & Incentives?
items.description: V drives growth with global partnership renewals and targeted incentives, but rising costs may test margins in a shifting payments market.

items.title: Mastercard and Entrust Expand Ties to Strengthen Identity Verification
items.description: MA aims to control the rising incidence of identity fraud as Entrust integrates Mastercard Identity insights, offering smarter, risk-based verification tools.

items.title: Visa Inc. (V) Isa Inc. Presents At Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference 2025 Transcript
items.description: Get the latest insights on Visa's growth, payments innovation

items.title: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Visa (V): Should You Buy?
items.description: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Visa (V) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

items.title: Elliptic powers risk intelligence for BVNK's Layer1 - enabling stablecoin payments, trading and settlement at scale
items.description: Elliptic, the global leader in digital asset decisioning, has partnered with BVNK to integrate Elliptic Lens into Layer1, the firm's stablecoin infrastructure for self-managed payments, enabling financial institutions to embed stablecoin flows with built-in risk intelligence and screening. Layer1 powers BVNK's platform and processes billions in payments each year, establishing itself as a trusted partner to fintechs, stablecoin issuers, and global payment providers.
